option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- res/drawable-night/bg_chip_outlined.xml — Fondo con borde redondeado para labels LHS/RHS en modo oscuro --> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="@color/chip_outlined_bg"/> <corners android:radius="9dp"/> <stroke android:width="1dp" android:color="@color/chip_outlined_border"/> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- res/drawable-night/bg_radio_option.xml — StateListDrawable para opciones de tema en modo oscuro --> <selector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:state_checked="true"> <shape android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="?attr/colorSecondaryContainer"/> <corners android:radius="10dp"/> <stroke android:width="1.5dp" android:color="?attr/colorPrimary"/> </shape> </item> <item> <shape android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant"/> <corners android:radius="10dp"/> <stroke android:width="0.5dp" android:color="?attr/colorOutline"/> </shape> </item> </selector>

option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- res/drawable-night/bg_status.xml — Fondo redondeado gris para texto de estado en modo oscuro --> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant"/> <corners android:radius="8dp"/> <stroke android:width="0.5dp" android:color="?attr/colorOutline"/> </shape>

option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- res/drawable/bg_radio_option.xml — StateListDrawable para opciones de tema --> <selector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:state_checked="true"> <shape android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="@color/radio_selected_bg_light"/> <corners android:radius="10dp"/> <stroke android:width="1.5dp" android:color="@color/color_primary"/> </shape> </item> <item> <shape android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="@color/radio_unselected_bg_light"/> <corners android:radius="10dp"/> <stroke android:width="0.5dp" android:color="@color/radio_border_light"/> </shape> </item> </selector>

option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- res/drawable/bg_radio_option.xml — StateListDrawable para opciones de tema --> <selector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:state_checked="true"> <shape android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="?attr/colorSecondaryContainer"/> <corners android:radius="10dp"/> <stroke android:width="1.5dp" android:color="?attr/colorPrimary"/> </shape> </item> <item> <shape android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant"/> <corners android:radius="10dp"/> <stroke android:width="0.5dp" android:color="?attr/colorOutline"/> </shape> </item> </selector>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor" tools:context=".ui.config.ConfiguracionActivity">
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottom_nav" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" app:menu="@menu/menu_bottom_nav" app:labelVisibilityMode="labeled" app:itemTextColor="@color/nav_item_color" app:itemIconTint="@color/nav_item_color" android:elevation="@dimen/card_elevation" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_default" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_default" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="2dp" tools:ignore="UnusedAttribute"> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/title_config" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" /> </LinearLayout>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_username" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:letterSpacing="0.08" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="@dimen/margin_small" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="@dimen/margin_small" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="@dimen/margin_small" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_username" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:inputType="textPersonName" android:hint="@string/label_hint"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_theme" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:letterSpacing="0.08" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<RadioGroup android:id="@+id/rg_theme" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large">
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/rb_light" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/theme_light" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:checked="true" android:background="@drawable/bg_radio_option" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_small" android:button="@null" android:gravity="center" />
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/rb_dark" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/theme_dark" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:background="@drawable/bg_radio_option" android:button="@null" android:gravity="center" /> </RadioGroup>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_save" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:text="@string/config_save" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:backgroundTint="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:contentDescription="@string/config_save" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_credits" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:letterSpacing="0.08" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_tonal_card">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_version_info" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/dev_name_1" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/dev_name_2" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/dev_name_3" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/team_info" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView> </LinearLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor" tools:context=".ui.config.ConfiguracionActivity">
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottom_nav" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" app:menu="@menu/menu_bottom_nav" app:labelVisibilityMode="labeled" app:itemTextColor="@color/nav_item_color" app:itemIconTint="@color/nav_item_color" android:elevation="@dimen/card_elevation" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_default" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_default" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="2dp" tools:ignore="UnusedAttribute"> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/title_config" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" /> </LinearLayout>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_username" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:letterSpacing="0.08" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="@dimen/margin_small" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="@dimen/margin_small" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="@dimen/margin_small" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_username" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:inputType="textPersonName" android:hint="@string/label_hint"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_theme" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:letterSpacing="0.08" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<RadioGroup android:id="@+id/rg_theme" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large">
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/rb_light" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/theme_light" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:checked="true" android:background="@drawable/bg_radio_option" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_small" android:button="@null" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextPrimary" />
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/rb_dark" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/theme_dark" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:background="@drawable/bg_radio_option" android:button="@null" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextPrimary" /> </RadioGroup>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_save" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:text="@string/config_save" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:backgroundTint="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:contentDescription="@string/config_save" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_credits" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:letterSpacing="0.08" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorBgTonalCard">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_version_info" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/dev_name_1" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/dev_name_2" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/dev_name_3" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/team_info" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView> </LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor">
<!-- TOOLBAR SUPERIOR --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/toolbar_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_tiny" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="@dimen/card_elevation">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_back" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_tiny" android:text="@string/btn_exit_text" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/exercise_title_1" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/tv_timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_tiny" android:text="@string/timer_default" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:fontFamily="monospace" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/warn_chip_bg" android:textColor="@color/warn_chip_text" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hint" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:text="@string/btn_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:text="@string/btn_hamburger" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/toolbar_height" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/method_balanza" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary_alpha" android:textColor="@color/color_primary_dark" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/padding_card" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/padding_card"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_solve" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/eq_balanza" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_equation" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_balanza" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/balanza_image_height" android:src="@drawable/ic_balanza" android:contentDescription="@string/desc_balanza" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny"/>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" android:baselineAligned="false"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_lhs" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip_outlined" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:text="x+5" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/equal_sign" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginHorizontal="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_rhs" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip_outlined" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:text="10" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_balance_status" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/balance_status_initial" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="@dimen/status_bar_padding" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" android:gravity="center" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/padding_card" android:baselineAligned="false"> <Button android:id="@+id/btn_op_minus5" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/op_minus_5" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> <Button android:id="@+id/btn_op_plus5" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/op_plus_5" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> <Button android:id="@+id/btn_op_times2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/op_times_2" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> <Button android:id="@+id/btn_op_div2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/op_div_2" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/padding_card"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/x_equals" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_small"/> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="@dimen/margin_tiny"> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_answer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" android:hint="@string/answer_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:gravity="center"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_verify" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_small" android:text="@string/btn_verify" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:backgroundTint="@color/color_primary" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView> </androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor">
<!-- TOOLBAR SUPERIOR --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/toolbar_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_tiny" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="@dimen/card_elevation">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_back" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_tiny" android:text="@string/btn_exit_text" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/exercise_title_1" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/tv_timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_tiny" android:text="@string/timer_default" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:fontFamily="monospace" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorWarnChipBg" android:textColor="?attr/colorWarnChipText" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hint" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:text="@string/btn_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:text="@string/btn_hamburger" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/toolbar_height" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/method_balanza" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorPrimaryAlpha" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/padding_card" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/padding_card"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_solve" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/eq_balanza" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_equation" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_balanza" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/balanza_image_height" android:src="@drawable/ic_balanza" android:contentDescription="@string/desc_balanza" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny"/>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" android:baselineAligned="false"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_lhs" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip_outlined" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:text="x+5" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/equal_sign" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:layout_marginHorizontal="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_rhs" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip_outlined" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:text="10" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_balance_status" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/balance_status_initial" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="@dimen/status_bar_padding" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" android:gravity="center" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/padding_card" android:baselineAligned="false"> <Button android:id="@+id/btn_op_minus5" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/op_minus_5" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> <Button android:id="@+id/btn_op_plus5" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/op_plus_5" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> <Button android:id="@+id/btn_op_times2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/op_times_2" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> <Button android:id="@+id/btn_op_div2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/op_div_2" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_tiny"/> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/padding_card"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/x_equals" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_small"/> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="@dimen/margin_tiny"> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_answer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" android:hint="@string/answer_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:gravity="center"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_verify" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_small" android:text="@string/btn_verify" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView> </androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- activity_ejercicio_clasico.xml — Pantalla D2: Ejercicio 2/3 (Método Clásico Baldor) Ecuación: 3x + 5 = 20 Muestra el desarrollo algebraico paso a paso con Chips de Material Design. Topbar: ← Temas | Ejercicio 2/3 | ⏱ | | ≡ --> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor">
<!-- TOPBAR --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="4dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_back" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="← Salir" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/tv_timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="32dp" android:text="2:00" android:textSize="13sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/warn_chip_bg" android:textColor="@color/warn_chip_text" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/exercise_classic_title" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hint" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="" android:textSize="13sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="≡" android:textSize="16sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- DRAWER --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawer_menu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:elevation="8dp" android:visibility="gone" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Inicio --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_inicio" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Inicio" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_home" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<!-- Temas --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_temas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Temas" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_book" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<!-- Salas --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_salas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Salas" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_room" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<!-- Stats --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_stats" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Stats" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_bar_chart" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<!-- Config (Ajustado para visibilidad total) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_config" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Config" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_settings" app:iconGravity="top" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- SCROLL CONTENT --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:padding="14dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Ecuación principal --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="14dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_solve" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/eq_clasico" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Paso 1 --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/step_active" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@drawable/bg_step_active" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="10dp" android:paddingBottom="10dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="3x" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="+5" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="= " android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="20" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Paso 2: 3x = 20 - 5 --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="3x" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="= " android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="20" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="−" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="5" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Paso 3: 3x = 15 --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="3x" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="= " android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="15" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Paso 4: x = 15 ÷ 3 --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="14dp"> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="x" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="= " android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="15" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="÷" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="3" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- CAMPO DE RESPUESTA --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="x =" android:textSize="16sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="10dp"> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_answer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" android:hint="?" android:textSize="18sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:gravity="center"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_verify" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="Verificar" android:textSize="15sp" android:backgroundTint="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="10dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- activity_ejercicio_clasico.xml — Pantalla D2: Ejercicio 2/3 (Método Clásico Baldor) Ecuación: 3x + 5 = 20 Muestra el desarrollo algebraico paso a paso con Chips de Material Design. Topbar: ← Temas | Ejercicio 2/3 | ⏱ | | ≡ --> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor">
<!-- TOPBAR --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="4dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_back" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="← Salir" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/tv_timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="32dp" android:text="2:00" android:textSize="13sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/warn_chip_bg" android:textColor="@color/warn_chip_text" android:layout_marginEnd="1dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/exercise_classic_title" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hint" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="" android:textSize="13sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="≡" android:textSize="16sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- DRAWER --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawer_menu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:elevation="8dp" android:visibility="gone" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Inicio --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_inicio" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Inicio" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_home" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<!-- Temas --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_temas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Temas" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_book" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<!-- Salas --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_salas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Salas" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_room" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<!-- Stats --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_stats" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Stats" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_bar_chart" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<!-- Config (Ajustado para visibilidad total) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_config" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Config" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_settings" app:iconGravity="top" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- SCROLL CONTENT --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:padding="14dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Ecuación principal --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="14dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_solve" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/eq_clasico" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Paso 1 --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/step_active" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@drawable/bg_step_active" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="10dp" android:paddingBottom="10dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="3x" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="+5" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="= " android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="20" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Paso 2: 3x = 20 - 5 --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="3x" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="= " android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="20" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="−" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="5" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Paso 3: 3x = 15 --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="3x" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="= " android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="15" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Paso 4: x = 15 ÷ 3 --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="14dp"> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="x" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="= " android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="15" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="÷" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp"/> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="3" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- CAMPO DE RESPUESTA --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="x =" android:textSize="16sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="10dp"> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_answer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" android:hint="?" android:textSize="18sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:gravity="center"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_verify" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="Verificar" android:textSize="15sp" android:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" app:cornerRadius="10dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- activity_ejercicio_tiles.xml — Refactorizado sin Hardcode --> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor">
<!-- TOOLBAR (Reutilizando el patrón estandarizado) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/toolbar_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_small" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_small" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="@dimen/card_elevation">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_back" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_tiny" android:text="@string/btn_exit_text" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/exercise_title_3" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/tv_timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_tiny" android:text="@string/timer_default" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:fontFamily="monospace" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/warn_chip_bg" android:textColor="@color/warn_chip_text" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hint" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:text="@string/btn_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:text="@string/btn_hamburger" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- DRAWER (Mismo patrón que layouts anteriores) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawer_menu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/toolbar_height" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:elevation="@dimen/card_elevation" android:visibility="gone" android:gravity="center" android:baselineAligned="false">
<!-- Botones omitidos por brevedad, usar el mismo patrón que Balanza/Clásico --> </LinearLayout>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/toolbar_height" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/method_tiles" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary_alpha" android:textColor="@color/color_primary_dark" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/padding_card" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/padding_card">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_solve" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/eq_tiles" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/tiles_instruction" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" android:baselineAligned="false">
<!-- Lado Izquierdo --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/tile_container_height" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="@color/color_primary" app:strokeWidth="@dimen/tile_stroke_width" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/tile_container_padding"> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_left" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_micro" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_tiles_left" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="@dimen/equal_divider_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/equal_sign" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h2" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center"/>
<!-- Lado Derecho --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/tile_container_height" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="@color/color_primary" app:strokeWidth="@dimen/tile_stroke_width" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/tile_container_padding"> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_right" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_micro" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_tiles_right" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_tiles_status" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/tiles_status_initial" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="@dimen/status_bar_padding" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/padding_card" android:gravity="center" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
<!-- Campo de Respuesta Estandarizado --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/x_equals" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_small"/>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="@dimen/margin_tiny">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_answer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" android:hint="@string/answer_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:gravity="center"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_verify" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_small" android:text="@string/btn_verify" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:backgroundTint="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/margin_small"/> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hint" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:text="@string/btn_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/medal_icon_size" android:text="@string/btn_hamburger" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small"/> </LinearLayout>

<!-- Botones omitidos por brevedad, usar el mismo patrón que Balanza/Clásico --> </LinearLayout>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/toolbar_height" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/method_tiles" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary_alpha" android:textColor="@color/color_primary_dark" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
