<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_solve" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/eq_tiles" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/tiles_instruction" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" android:baselineAligned="false">
<!-- Lado Izquierdo --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/tile_container_height" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="@color/color_primary" app:strokeWidth="@dimen/tile_stroke_width" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/tile_container_padding"> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_left" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_micro" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_tiles_left" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="@dimen/equal_divider_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/equal_sign" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h2" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center"/>
<!-- Lado Derecho --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/tile_container_height" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="@color/color_primary" app:strokeWidth="@dimen/tile_stroke_width" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorSurfaceVariant">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/tile_container_padding"> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_right" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_micro" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_tiny" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_tiles_right" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_tiles_status" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/tiles_status_initial" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_tiny" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="@dimen/status_bar_padding" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/padding_card" android:gravity="center" tools:ignore="SmallSp"/>
<!-- Campo de Respuesta Estandarizado --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/x_equals" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_small"/>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="@dimen/margin_tiny" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="@dimen/margin_tiny">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_answer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" android:hint="@string/answer_hint" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:gravity="center"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_verify" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height_small" android:text="@string/btn_verify" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/margin_small"/> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor" tools:context=".ui.stats.EstadisticasActivity">
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottom_nav" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" app:menu="@menu/menu_bottom_nav" app:labelVisibilityMode="labeled" app:itemTextColor="@color/nav_item_color" app:itemIconTint="@color/nav_item_color" android:elevation="@dimen/card_elevation" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_default" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_default" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="2dp" tools:ignore="UnusedAttribute"> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/title_stats" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" /> </LinearLayout>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card" android:clipToPadding="false">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<GridLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:columnCount="2" android:useDefaultMargins="false" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default">
<!-- Card Puntos --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="90dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_tonal_card"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_pts" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/zero" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/stat_points" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Card Progreso --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="90dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_tonal_card"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_prog" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/zero_pct" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/stat_total_progress" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Card Racha --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="90dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_tonal_card"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_streak" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/zero" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/stat_streak" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Card Resueltos --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="90dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_tonal_card"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_resolved" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/zero" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/stat_resolved" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </GridLayout>
<!-- Contenedor Dinámico de Módulos --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default"> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_modules_progress_container" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Encabezado de Medallas --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_medals_header" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/label_medals_format" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:letterSpacing="0.08" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SmallSp" />
<!-- Galería de Medallas --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_medal_1" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/medal_bronze" android:textSize="24sp" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_medal_locked" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/medal_name_1" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_medal_streak" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/medal_fire" android:textSize="24sp" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_medal_locked" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/medal_name_streak" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:alpha="0.4"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_medal_mod" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/medal_silver" android:textSize="24sp" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_medal_locked" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/medal_name_modules" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" tools:ignore="SmallSp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView> </LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- activity_exercise.xml — Activity genérica refactorizada --> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor">
<!-- TOOLBAR --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="4dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_back" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="32dp" android:text="@string/btn_exit_text" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_toolbar_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/qa_temas" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/tv_timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="32dp" android:text="@string/timer_default" android:textSize="11sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/warn_chip_bg" android:textColor="@color/warn_chip_text" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hint" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="@string/btn_hint" android:textSize="13sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="@string/btn_hamburger" android:textSize="16sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- DRAWER (Menú desplegable) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawer_menu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:elevation="8dp" android:visibility="gone" android:gravity="center" android:baselineAligned="false">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_inicio" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_inicio_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_home" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_temas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_temas_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_book" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_salas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_salas_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_room" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_stats" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_stats_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_bar_chart" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_config" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_config_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_settings" app:iconGravity="top"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="14dp">
<FrameLayout android:id="@+id/panel_container" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1"/>
<!-- Fila de respuesta común --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginTop="12dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/x_equals" android:textSize="15sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="10dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_answer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal|numberSigned" android:hint="@string/answer_hint" android:textSize="18sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:gravity="center"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_verify" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="@string/btn_verify" android:textSize="12sp" app:cornerRadius="10dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/color_primary" android:layout_marginStart="8dp"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- LOADING OVERLAY --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/loading_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#88000000" android:visibility="gone"> <ProgressBar android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="center"/> </FrameLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- activity_exercise.xml — Activity genérica refactorizada --> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor">
<!-- TOOLBAR --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="4dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_back" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="32dp" android:text="@string/btn_exit_text" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_toolbar_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/qa_temas" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextPrimary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/tv_timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="32dp" android:text="@string/timer_default" android:textSize="11sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorWarnChipBg" android:textColor="?attr/colorWarnChipText" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hint" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="@string/btn_hint" android:textSize="13sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="@string/btn_hamburger" android:textSize="16sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- DRAWER (Menú desplegable) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawer_menu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:elevation="8dp" android:visibility="gone" android:gravity="center" android:baselineAligned="false">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_inicio" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_inicio_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_home" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_temas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_temas_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_book" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_salas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_salas_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_room" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_stats" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_stats_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_bar_chart" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_config" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_config_short" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_settings" app:iconGravity="top"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="14dp">
<FrameLayout android:id="@+id/panel_container" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1"/>
<!-- Fila de respuesta común --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginTop="12dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/x_equals" android:textSize="15sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextPrimary" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomEnd="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopEnd="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusBottomStart="10dp" app:boxCornerRadiusTopStart="10dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_answer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal|numberSigned" android:hint="@string/answer_hint" android:textSize="18sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:gravity="center"/> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_verify" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="@string/btn_verify" android:textSize="12sp" app:cornerRadius="10dp" android:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" android:layout_marginStart="8dp"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- LOADING OVERLAY --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/loading_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#88000000" android:visibility="gone"> <ProgressBar android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="center"/> </FrameLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor" tools:context=".ui.ejercicios.FinEjerciciosActivity">
<!-- Header Toolbar --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_default" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_default" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="2dp" tools:ignore="UnusedAttribute">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/title_module_completed" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Contenido Central --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="@dimen/margin_large">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="" android:textSize="56sp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default" android:importantForAccessibility="no"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/msg_module_finished" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h2" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large"/>
<!-- Grid de Resultados --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default" android:baselineAligned="false">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/tile_container_height" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_tonal_card">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_fin_ok" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/zero" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/color_primary"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/stat_correct" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/tile_container_height" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_tonal_card">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_fin_fail" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/zero" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/error"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/stat_incorrect" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Puntos Obtenidos --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/tv_fin_pts" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="+0 puntos" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/warn_chip_bg" android:textColor="@color/warn_chip_text" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SpeakableTextPresentCheck" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/summary_methods" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_go_temas" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:text="@string/btn_back_to_topics" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:backgroundTint="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:contentDescription="@string/desc_back_to_topics"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>

<!-- Header Toolbar --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_default" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_default" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="2dp" tools:ignore="UnusedAttribute">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/title_module_completed" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextPrimary"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Contenido Central --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="@dimen/margin_large">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="" android:textSize="56sp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default" android:importantForAccessibility="no"/>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/msg_module_finished" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h2" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextPrimary" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large"/>
<!-- Grid de Resultados --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default" android:baselineAligned="false">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/tile_container_height" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorBgTonalCard">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_fin_ok" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/zero" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/stat_correct" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/tile_container_height" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorBgTonalCard">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_fin_fail" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/zero" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/error"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/stat_incorrect" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Puntos Obtenidos --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/tv_fin_pts" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="+0 puntos" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" app:chipBackgroundColor="?attr/colorWarnChipBg" android:textColor="?attr/colorWarnChipText" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small" tools:ignore="SpeakableTextPresentCheck" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/summary_methods" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_large"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_go_temas" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:text="@string/btn_back_to_topics" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:backgroundTint="?attr/colorPrimary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small" android:contentDescription="@string/desc_back_to_topics"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor">
<!-- TOOLBAR SUPERIOR --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="4dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_module_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Módulo 1" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="≡" android:textSize="16sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- DRAWER --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawer_menu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:elevation="8dp" android:visibility="gone" android:gravity="center">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_inicio" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Inicio" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_home" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_temas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Temas" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_book" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_salas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Salas" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_room" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_stats" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Stats" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_bar_chart" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_config" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Config" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_settings" app:iconGravity="top" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="50dp">
<com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout android:id="@+id/tabs" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" app:tabTextColor="@color/text_secondary" app:tabSelectedTextColor="@color/color_primary" app:tabIndicatorColor="@color/color_primary" app:tabIndicatorHeight="2dp"/>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/content_info" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary_alpha" app:strokeColor="@color/color_primary_light" app:strokeWidth="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_info_title_1" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="¿Qué es una ecuación?" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/color_primary_dark" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_info_text_1" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="..." android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/color_primary_dark" android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_primary_alpha" app:strokeColor="@color/color_primary_light" app:strokeWidth="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_info_title_2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Forma simple" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/color_primary_dark" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_info_text_2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="..." android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/color_primary_dark" android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/content_ejemplos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_example_equation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="x + 3 = 7" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default" android:background="@drawable/bg_equation_box" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_example_steps" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
<!-- BARRA DE NAVEGACIÓN INFERIOR --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/nav_bar_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_default" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_default" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="@dimen/card_elevation">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_volver" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:text="← Volver" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_page_indicator" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="1 / 2" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_next" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:text="Ejemplos →" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:backgroundTint="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/backgroundColor">
<!-- TOOLBAR SUPERIOR --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="4dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_module_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Módulo 1" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_hamburger" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:text="≡" android:textSize="16sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="8dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- DRAWER --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawer_menu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:padding="@dimen/margin_small" android:elevation="8dp" android:visibility="gone" android:gravity="center">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_inicio" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Inicio" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_home" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_temas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Temas" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_book" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_salas" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Salas" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_room" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_stats" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Stats" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_bar_chart" app:iconGravity="top" app:iconTint="@null" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/drawer_config" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_margin="2dp" android:text="Config" android:textSize="9sp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_settings" app:iconGravity="top" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="50dp">
<com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout android:id="@+id/tabs" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" app:tabTextColor="@color/text_secondary" app:tabSelectedTextColor="@color/color_primary" app:tabIndicatorColor="@color/color_primary" app:tabIndicatorHeight="2dp"/>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/content_info" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorPrimaryAlpha" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_info_title_1" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="¿Qué es una ecuación?" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_info_text_1" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="..." android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorPrimaryAlpha" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/padding_card"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_info_title_2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Forma simple" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_body" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_small"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_info_text_2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="..." android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/content_ejemplos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_example_equation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="x + 3 = 7" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_h1" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:padding="@dimen/margin_default" android:background="@drawable/bg_equation_box" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/margin_default"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_example_steps" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
<!-- BARRA DE NAVEGACIÓN INFERIOR --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/nav_bar_height" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_default" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_default" android:background="?attr/colorSurface" android:elevation="@dimen/card_elevation">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_volver" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:text="← Volver" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_page_indicator" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="1 / 2" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center"/>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_next" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/button_height" android:text="Ejemplos →" android:textSize="@dimen/text_size_small" android:backgroundTint="@color/color_primary" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/margin_small"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Panel BALANZA — inflado en ExerciseActivity cuando exercise.type = "BALANZA" --> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Ecuación --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_eq_label" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Resuelve:" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/> <!-- La ecuación se inyecta dinámicamente desde el ViewModel --> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- SVG Balanza --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_balanza" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="90dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_balanza" android:contentDescription="Balanza" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/>
<!-- Labels LHS / RHS --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_lhs" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textSize="14sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip_outlined" android:padding="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="=" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginHorizontal="6dp"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_rhs" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textSize="14sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/color_primary" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip_outlined" android:padding="8dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Status --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_balance_status" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:gravity="center"/>
<!-- Botones de operación (generados dinámicamente desde DB) --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Aplica la misma operación a ambos lados:" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_op_buttons" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"/> <!-- Los botones se añaden en ExerciseActivity.bindBalanzaPanel() -->
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Panel BALANZA — inflado en ExerciseActivity cuando exercise.type = "BALANZA" --> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Ecuación --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorBgTonalCard" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_eq_label" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Resuelve:" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/> <!-- La ecuación se inyecta dinámicamente desde el ViewModel --> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- SVG Balanza --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_balanza" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="90dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_balanza" android:contentDescription="Balanza" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/>
<!-- Labels LHS / RHS --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_lhs" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textSize="14sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip_outlined" android:padding="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"/> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="=" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:layout_marginHorizontal="6dp"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_rhs" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textSize="14sp" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip_outlined" android:padding="8dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Status --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_balance_status" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:gravity="center"/>
<!-- Botones de operación (generados dinámicamente desde DB) --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Aplica la misma operación a ambos lados:" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_op_buttons" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"/> <!-- Los botones se añaden en ExerciseActivity.bindBalanzaPanel() -->
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Panel CLÁSICO — inflado cuando exercise.type = "CLASICO" --> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Ecuación destacada --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Resuelve:" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_equation_display" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="26sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Título de pasos --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Solución paso a paso:" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"/>
<!-- Pasos de solución (generados dinámicamente desde JSON en DB) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_solution_steps" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"/> <!-- Los TextViews de cada paso se añaden en bindClasicoPanel() -->
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Panel CLÁSICO — inflado cuando exercise.type = "CLASICO" --> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Ecuación destacada --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorBgTonalCard" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="16dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Resuelve:" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_equation_display" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="26sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextPrimary"/> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Título de pasos --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Solución paso a paso:" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextPrimary" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"/>
<!-- Pasos de solución (generados dinámicamente desde JSON en DB) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_solution_steps" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"/> <!-- Los TextViews de cada paso se añaden en bindClasicoPanel() -->
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Panel TILES — inflado cuando exercise.type = "TILES" --> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Instrucción --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Mueve los tiles para aislar x en el lado izquierdo" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"/>
<!-- Área de tiles: Izquierdo --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Lado izquierdo" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" app:cardCornerRadius="10dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_tiles_left" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:padding="8dp"/> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Separador "=" --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="━━━━━━━━ = ━━━━━━━━" android:gravity="center" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginVertical="4dp"/>
<!-- Área de tiles: Derecho --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Lado derecho" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" app:cardCornerRadius="10dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_tiles_right" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:padding="8dp"/> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Status --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_tiles_status" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="8dp" android:gravity="center"/>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Panel TILES — inflado cuando exercise.type = "TILES" --> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Instrucción --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Mueve los tiles para aislar x en el lado izquierdo" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"/>
<!-- Área de tiles: Izquierdo --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Lado izquierdo" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" app:cardCornerRadius="10dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorBgTonalCard" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_tiles_left" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:padding="8dp"/> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Separador "=" --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="━━━━━━━━ = ━━━━━━━━" android:gravity="center" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:layout_marginVertical="4dp"/>
<!-- Área de tiles: Derecho --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Lado derecho" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" app:cardCornerRadius="10dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorBgTonalCard" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_tiles_right" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:padding="8dp"/> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Status --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_tiles_status" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorTextSecondary" android:background="@drawable/bg_status" android:padding="8dp" android:gravity="center"/>
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- res/values-night/colors.xml Paleta de colores para modo oscuro --> <resources> <!-- PRIMARY (morado - más claro en oscuro) --> <color name="color_primary">#E1BEE7</color> <color name="color_primary_dark">#7B1FA2</color> <color name="color_primary_light">#E1BEE7</color> <color name="color_primary_alpha">#1AE1BEE7</color>
<!-- CARD BACKGROUND (oscuro) --> <color name="color_bg_tonal_card">#374151</color> <color name="color_outline">#4B5563</color>
<!-- ACCENT (cyan) --> <color name="accent_color">#00BCD4</color> <color name="accent_green">#10B981</color> <color name="accent_green_bg">#064E3B</color>
<!-- TEXT (claro en oscuro) --> <color name="text_primary">#F9FAFB</color> <color name="text_secondary">#9CA3AF</color> <color name="divider">#4B5563</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFF</color>
<!-- STATUS --> <color name="error">#F87171</color> <color name="error_bg">#7F1D1D</color> <color name="success">#10B981</color> <color name="success_bg">#064E3B</color> <color name="warn_bg">#78350F</color> <color name="warn_chip_bg">#78350F</color> <color name="warn_chip_text">#FDE68A</color>
<!-- SURFACES (oscuro) --> <color name="surface_light">#1F2937</color> <color name="background_light">#111827</color> <color name="surface_dark">#1F2937</color> <color name="background_dark">#111827</color> <color name="card_dark">#374151</color>
<color name="textColorPrimary">@color/text_primary</color> <color name="textColorSecondary">@color/text_secondary</color>
<!-- DARK-MODE SURFACES para drawables --> <color name="surface_card_light">#1F2937</color> <color name="surface_card_dark_themed">#374151</color> <color name="radio_selected_bg_light">#2D3748</color> <color name="radio_unselected_bg_light">#1F2937</color> <color name="radio_border_light">#4B5563</color> <color name="white_color">#1F2937</color> <color name="status_border_light">#4B5563</color> <color name="medal_locked_bg">#374151</color> <color name="medal_locked_border">#4B5563</color> <color name="chip_outlined_bg">#2D3748</color> <color name="chip_outlined_border">#4B5563</color> <color name="progress_track">#4B5563</color> <color name="equation_box_bg_light">#1F2937</color> <color name="textColorSecundar">#9CA3AF</color> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- res/values/themes.xml — Tema claro (default) + Tema oscuro --> <resources> <!-- Tema claro --> <style name="Theme.FunZ" parent="Theme.Material3.Light.NoActionBar"> <item name="colorPrimary">@color/color_primary</item> <item name="colorPrimaryDark">@color/color_primary_dark</item> <item name="colorAccent">@color/accent_color</item> <item name="colorSurface">@color/surface_light</item> <item name="android:colorBackground">@color/background_light</item> <item name="backgroundColor">@color/background_light</item> <item name="android:textColorPrimary">@color/text_primary</item> <item name="android:textColorSecondary">@color/text_secondary</item> <item name="android:statusBarColor">@color/color_primary</item> <item name="android:navigationBarColor">@color/surface_light</item>
<item name="colorTextPrimary">@color/text_primary</item> <item name="colorTextSecondary">@color/text_secondary</item> <item name="colorBgTonalCard">@color/color_bg_tonal_card</item> <item name="colorNavItem">@color/text_secondary</item> <item name="colorWarnChipBg">@color/warn_chip_bg</item> <item name="colorWarnChipText">@color/warn_chip_text</item> <item name="colorPrimaryAlpha">@color/color_primary_alpha</item>
</style>
<!-- Tema oscuro--> <style name="Theme.FunZ.Dark" parent="Theme.Material3.Dark.NoActionBar"> <item name="colorPrimary">@color/color_primary_light</item> <item name="colorPrimaryDark">@color/color_primary</item> <item name="colorAccent">@color/accent_color</item> <item name="colorSurface">@color/surface_dark</item> <item name="android:colorBackground">@color/background_dark</item> <item name="backgroundColor">@color/background_dark</item> <item name="android:textColorPrimary">@color/white_color</item> <item name="android:textColorSecondary">@color/textColorSecundar</item> <item name="android:statusBarColor">@color/color_primary_dark</item> <item name="android:navigationBarColor">@color/surface_dark</item>
<item name="colorTextPrimary">@color/white_color</item> <item name="colorTextSecondary">@color/textColorSecundar</item> <item name="colorBgTonalCard">@color/card_dark</item> <item name="colorNavItem">@color/white_color</item> <item name="colorWarnChipBg">#451A03</item> <item name="colorWarnChipText">#FDE68A</item> <item name="colorPrimaryAlpha">#33E1BEE7</item> <item name="colorSecondary">@color/accent_color</item> <item name="colorSecondaryContainer">@color/color_primary_dark</item> <item name="colorOnSecondaryContainer">@color/surface_card_light</item> <item name="colorSurface">@color/surface_dark</item> <item name="colorOnSurface">@color/white_color</item> <item name="colorOnSurfaceVariant">@color/textColorSecundar</item></style>
</resources>
